commands.name: audit
commands.description: Full design + token audit of the current build
commands.prompt:
Run a full audit of all files touched in this chat.

Check systematically:
1. CSS: Any hardcoded hex values, px values, or font names instead of token references?
2. Schema: Any name > 25 characters or empty default values?
3. Structure: Duplicate classes, redundant wrappers, or patterns not from _examples/?
4. JS: Console errors or fragile selectors?
5. Mobile: All grids collapsing correctly?
6. Token discipline: Are all spacing, colors, radii consistently using CSS variables?
7. Wrapper margin collisions: Do theme wrappers like .product-custom-liquid, .shopify-section, .section-wrapper have their own margin-top/bottom that collide with component-own spacing? If yes: set them to 0 in a scoped {% style %} block so only component token spacing applies.
8. Hidden spacing: Any place where the actual rendered gap exceeds var(--space-6) without a token explaining it?

For every problem found:
- Name the file and line
- Fix it directly

Then: Write new rules as ## Learned Patterns at the end of .cursor/rules/design-components.mdc
And: Write ## Theme Wrapper Awareness rules into .cursor/rules/shopify-rules.mdc
Format as concrete Do/Don't rules, not explanations.

commands.name: section-start
commands.description: Start a new section build correctly
commands.prompt:
Before writing any code:
1. Read _examples/README.md
2. Open _examples/pdp-reference.html
3. Find the closest approved example in _examples/sections/
4. Read its {% comment %} block and its CSS file
5. Inspect the current theme structure — which files are involved?
6. Report what you found before touching anything.

Only proceed after reporting.

commands.name: qa
commands.prompt:
Run the full Visual Craft QA checklist from .cursor/rules/design-components.mdc against the current build.

Check every item:
- One dominant element per section?
- Supporting elements visually subordinate?
- CTA has var(--space-7) minimum above it?
- All tokens used correctly — no hardcoded values?
- Section feels designed, not assembled?
- Would hierarchy still look convincing without copy?
- Does this look premium enough for LIFETIME?

List every failure with file + line.
Fix all failures directly.
Output corrected code only — no explanations.
